use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for external links with glowing gradient effect
CTA buttons on landing pages requiring attention-grabbing hover states
Navigation buttons linking to external resources with animated arrow icon
ai_summary: A gradient button component featuring a luminous blur background that intensifies on hover, creating a glowing effect. The button includes an animated arrow icon that slides on hover, with smooth transition animations and a dark theme. Designed as a call-to-action element for links to external resources, commonly used in SaaS and marketing contexts.
